title: Common Envelope
description: Common v1 wrapper for API responses, event payloads, or command results that need traceable data or error output across ops-core and business-platform.
$comment: Source: docs/api-design-standard.md and docs/correlation-audit-standard.md require versioned APIs and consistent request/response/error metadata with correlation support.

data.description: Domain payload. Phase 1 does not define domain-specific data shapes.

error.description: Error payload when the envelope represents a failed or blocked result.

meta.description: Safe optional metadata. Do not place business logic or sensitive data here.
